package.name: helix_sensing_cpp
package.description: C++ rclcpp_lifecycle port of the HELIX anomaly detector. Drop-in replacement for the Python helix_core.anomaly_detector node: same node name (helix_anomaly_detector), same parameters, same topics (/diagnostics, /helix/metrics -> /helix/faults), same FaultEvent rounding behavior. Adds a cooldown-based suppression parameter (emit_cooldown_s) to replace the Python flood behavior while keeping legacy behavior available (emit_cooldown_s = 0.0).
